headline: The AI Revolution Comes to the Insurance Industry. Look Who’s Winning.
summary: The gallery roared as Hovland sank a birdie putt to clinch his eighth PGA Tour title.  Congratulations, too, came from Travelers CEO Alan Schnitzer, who handed Hovland the trophy (and a $3.6 million check to boot).
